items.name: Playmate Head
items.description: Become Playmate from Dite Hangout (Museum) with the Playmate Head! When you get trapped in Playmate's Domain, no one can save you, not even Bernard. So you must play Hide and Seek with him and find a hiding spot before he finishes counting. This evil yet cool entity is now available as a hat to wear and scare your friends in other games!
